process_overview: Evaluate Programs Performance is a subprocess that assesses the performance of existing academic programs and determines whether to start new ones or close underperforming ones. If performance is unsatisfactory, the process initiates steps to design a curriculum, build a proposal, seek headquarters and HEC approval, and launch a new program. Low intake programs are closed in parallel. The process ends once all necessary actions have been taken.

  <bpmn:process id="Process_1972" name="Evaluate Program Performance" isExecutable="true">
    <bpmn:laneSet id="LaneSet_1">
      <bpmn:lane id="Lane_1" name="Head Of Department (hod)">

    </bpmn:startEvent>
    <bpmn:inclusiveGateway id="Gateway_1" name="Program Performance Satisfactory?">
      <bpmn:incoming>Flow_start_to_Gateway_1</bpmn:incoming>
      <bpmn:outgoing>Flow_Gateway_1_to_Activity_4476_0</bpmn:outgoing>

    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_Gateway_1_to_Activity_4476_0" name="Satisfactory=ture" sourceRef="Gateway_1" targetRef="Activity_4476">
      <bpmn:conditionExpression xsi:type="bpmn:tFormalExpression">Satisfactory=ture</bpmn:conditionExpression>
    </bpmn:sequenceFlow>
    <bpmn:sequenceFlow id="Flow_Gateway_1_to_Activity_4482_1" name="Date=Invalid" sourceRef="Gateway_1" targetRef="Activity_4482">

Performers:

task.task_overview: Design the complete curriculum structure for the proposed new academic program. This includes selecting courses, defining learning outcomes, and structuring the program semester-wise.

job.description: Leads the academic department, oversees curriculum design, program launches, and ensures departmental goals align with university objectives.
job.name: Head of Department (HOD)

job.description: Oversees academic planning, coordinates with HEC/PEC/NCEAC for program approvals, and ensures smooth execution of all academic processes at the campus level.
job.name: Deputy Director Academics

task.task_overview: Evaluate programs that have consistently low enrollment and fall below the minimum required threshold. Communicate closure decisions to affected students, departments, and stakeholders, and make necessary arrangements for currently enrolled students.

job.description: Oversees academic planning, coordinates with HEC/PEC/NCEAC for program approvals, and ensures smooth execution of all academic processes at the campus level.
job.name: Deputy Director Academics

task.task_overview: Prepare a formal written proposal justifying the need for the new program. This includes feasibility analysis, market demand data, resource requirements, and expected outcomes.

job.description: Oversees academic planning, coordinates with HEC/PEC/NCEAC for program approvals, and ensures smooth execution of all academic processes at the campus level.
job.name: Deputy Director Academics

task.task_overview: Present the program proposal to university headquarters in a formal meeting. The HOD and Principal defend the proposal, covering curriculum, demand, faculty availability, and infrastructure readiness.

job.description: Heads the campus operations, presents and defends program proposals to university headquarters, and takes final administrative decisions regarding program additions and closures.
job.name: Principal

task.task_overview: Receive and review feedback from headquarters regarding available accommodations for the new program, including classroom availability, lab resources, and faculty positions.

job.description: Oversees academic planning, coordinates with HEC/PEC/NCEAC for program approvals, and ensures smooth execution of all academic processes at the campus level.
job.name: Deputy Director Academics

task.task_overview: Submit the approved program proposal to the Higher Education Commission (HEC) or PEC for engineering and coordinate with them through their evaluation and approval process.

job.description: Oversees academic planning, coordinates with HEC/PEC/NCEAC for program approvals, and ensures smooth execution of all academic processes at the campus level.
job.name: Deputy Director Academics

task.task_overview: Officially launch the newly approved academic program. This includes finalizing faculty assignments, setting up courses in the CMS, announcing the program to applicants, and preparing classrooms.

job.description: Leads the academic department, oversees curriculum design, program launches, and ensures departmental goals align with university objectives.
job.name: Head of Department (HOD)
